value: Huh. This squad's better than I thought.
All right, guys! Press on!

Hmph!
If this is the best they've got,
they're no match for us.

We're heading into the final zone.
Stay sharp!
Phew... That's it. Mission accomplished.

You saved my butt back there.
Appreciate the help!
Now, I owe you one.

I'll show you what I can really do
in the next sortie!
Huh... Not bad at all.

Keep it up. I'm counting on you.
Just don't think I'm easily impressed.

Hmph!
I've got to admit, you do good work!

Still, I didn't think you had it in you...
Maybe I didn't give you enough credit.

Wearing red isn't just for show.
I can see how valuable you are.
Well... I guess I should thank you.

Huh. I'll be damned!
I didn't think you'd take us so far so fast!

All right, let's go!
With the Assault Shroud at full power,
nobody can stand in our way!
So long as you can deliver, I can't complain.

C'mon, give the order to sortie!
I'll rack up more feats of battle than
you can count.

This battle is ours!
I expect nothing short of total victory!

This is my duty—as somebody who wears red...
and as a member of your squad.

Not good enough.
We can still get stronger.

Give it everything you can.
I'll make sure we come out on top!
Yzak Joule, Duel, taking off!
Here we go! Don't let your guard down!

Let's get this over with!
Try to keep up!

We're heading out!
We can't keep letting them get away with this!

Okay, I'll follow orders...
and tear through the enemy!

I'll take any challenger.
Nobody's a match for the Assault Shroud!

I'm sortieing!
Just sit back and watch me handle all of it!
Yzak Joule, commencing operations now!
I'll show you the gap between me and a Natural!
I say bring it! I'll take them down this time!
